title: lactuca calophylla
intro: Lactuca calophylla, also known as the 'Calico lettuce' or 'Calico dandelion', is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to soothe digestive issues and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Lactuca calophylla include supporting liver function, reducing oxidative stress, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used to aid in detoxification and promote overall well-being.
